items.key: (@@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'V' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được khai báo.' else N'The record is already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The record has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

declare @stt_rec_nv char(13), @cookie varchar(32) select @stt_rec_nv = stt_rec_nv, @cookie = convert(varchar(19), datetime2, 121) from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec if @@language = 'v' select rtrim(ma_nv) as ma_nv, rtrim(ten) as ten_nv, rtrim(ten_bp) as ten_bp, rtrim(ten_vtr) as ten_vtr, @cookie as cookie from vhrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec_nv else select rtrim(ma_nv) as ma_nv, rtrim(ten) as ten_nv, rtrim(ten_bp2) as ten_bp2, rtrim(ten_vtr2) as ten_vtr2, @cookie as cookie from vhrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec_nv
return
insert into hrkbctdgct select * from @dct select @stt_rec as stt_rec return

declare @nv_cu char(13), @nam_cu int, @ky_cu int select @nv_cu = stt_rec_nv, @nam_cu = nam, @ky_cu = ky from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec if not exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec_nv = @nv_cu and nam = @nam_cu and ky = @ky_cu) begin select 'ma_nv' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end if @stt_rec_nv <> @nv_cu or @nam <> @nam_cu or @ky <> @ky_cu begin if exists(select * from @@table where (stt_rec_nv = @stt_rec_nv and nam = @nam and ky = @ky) and not (stt_rec_nv = @nv_cu and nam = @nam_cu and ky = @ky_cu)) begin select 'ma_nv' as field, @$exists as message return end end if $dct.NewValue <> $dct.OldValue begin delete hrkbctdgct where stt_rec = @stt_rec update @dct set stt_rec = @stt_rec end
if $dct.NewValue <> $dct.OldValue insert into hrkbctdgct select * from @dct update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec

action.text: if exists(select 1 from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv) begin select stt_rec, isnull(case when @@language = 'V' then ten_bp else ten_bp2 end, ''), isnull(case when @@language = 'V' then ten_vtr else ten_vtr2 end, '') from vhrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv end else select '', '', '' return
